info.title: NatorOS Public API
info.description:
Public API for discovering and integrating with NatorOS, the agentic OS and AI OS for enterprise operations. Production writes require scoped credentials. Sandbox endpoints are safe for autonomous agents.

NatorOS is the agentic OS and AI OS for governed enterprise AI workers. This contract is optimized for autonomous agents: typed responses, JSON errors, OAuth/API key auth, rate-limit headers, idempotency, batch operations, sandbox writes, and deprecation metadata.

tags.name: Sandbox
tags.description: Safe public endpoints for autonomous agent testing.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Recommended for writes. Reusing a key returns the original mutation result.
